creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 224746
shar of print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2

This is a request from https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/print-epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2.80277/
This is the one that supports newer models than print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr.
I will also be the first maintainer.
However, I do not own a printer that supports this, so I cannot yet confirm that it works.
